title: Infinite Zoom
description: This mod adds a zoom feature that has no limit on zoooooming
body:
# What is it?
It's a zoom familiar with optifine but has no limits on zooming.

**! If using Fabric you need to download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) as well !**



![zooming example: donkey in savanna](https://i.postimg.cc/qRjDhkzR/infinitezoom1.gif)

![Zoom keybind in the Keybinds menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09ddd1c3f8e30e02685310ad48daa1d9ca58d938.png)

![zooming](https://i.postimg.cc/YSGzfzyf/zoom.gif)

This is an extended version of the well-known Optifine Zoom, but with a much higher range in zooming, meaning you can finally zoom far away without being limited to just a few dozen blocks.
